svg.title: SwiftBox architecture
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture: callers (VPS manager, command fixer) on top call the SwiftBox engine, which coordinates core modules (detect, plan, verify), adapters (linux, notify, repo), and a data layer (config, scripts, state+logs).

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the VPS manager call SwiftBox?')
sendPrompt('How does the command fixer call SwiftBox?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through what engine.py does step by step')
sendPrompt('What does detect.py do and what does it return?')
sendPrompt('What does plan.py do and how does permission enforcement work?')
sendPrompt('What does verify.py do after an action runs?')
sendPrompt('What do the linux adapters do in SwiftBox?')
sendPrompt('What do the notify adapters do?')
sendPrompt('What do the repo adapters do?')
sendPrompt('What does the config directory contain in SwiftBox?')
sendPrompt('What does the scripts directory contain in SwiftBox?')
sendPrompt('What do state and logs store in SwiftBox?')
